query:
SELECT sp.id, sp.name, sp.isLive, sp.userId, u.name as userName,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolioTransactions pt WHERE pt.portfolioId = sp.id) as tx_count
FROM savedPortfolios sp 
JOIN users u ON u.id = sp.userId
WHERE u.email = 'marc.weibel@weibel-mueller.ch'
ORDER BY sp.name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT sp.id, sp.name, sp.isLive, sp.userId, u.name as userName,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolioTransactions pt WHERE pt.portfolioId = sp.id) as tx_count
FROM savedPortfolios sp 
JOIN users u ON u.id = sp.userId
WHERE u.email = 'marc.weibel@weibel-mueller.ch'
ORDER BY sp.name
